mnemonics: F.A.T.S. for Forecasting Steps: Frame, Assemble, Test, Select
keyPoints: Forecasting involves predicting future values based on previously observed values
Different models (e.g., ARIMA, Exponential Smoothing) are suited for different patterns in the data
All forecasts are wrong - the goal is to quantify and minimize uncertainty
commonMistakes: Extrapolating a trend indefinitely without considering eventual saturation or reversal
Using a model that doesn't account for all components (trend, seasonality, cycle, irregular)
Ignoring forecast error measurements and over-interpreting point forecasts
